name: instant-worker — orphan_sweep PASS 6 flipped >5 stuck builds to failed in 15m (build pipeline degraded)
description: P1 warning. instant_orphan_sweep_reaped_total{reason='failed_build'} > 5 events in 15m. PASS 6 catches deployments stuck in 'building'/'deploying' for >30 min whose pod is in ImagePullBackOff/ErrImagePull/CrashLoopBackOff. A burst means many customers' builds are wedged at once — the most likely cause is a ghcr.io outage, a Kaniko image-push 403 (worker-rbac.yaml GHCR_PUSH_TOKEN scope), or an upstream registry auth failure. Check ghcr.io status, the api+worker+provisioner deploy.yml CI push step, and the kaniko build pod logs in instant-deploy-* namespaces. Source: worker/internal/metrics/metrics.go (OrphanSweepReapedTotal), emit site worker/internal/jobs/orphan_sweep_reconciler.go.

nrql.query: SELECT rate(sum(instant_orphan_sweep_reaped_total), 15 minutes) FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'instant_orphan_sweep_reaped_total' AND reason = 'failed_build'
